customer_reply.txt.text:
From: james.kowalski84@gmail.com
To: claims@example-insurance.com
Date: February 5, 2026 9:14 AM
Subject: RE: Missing documents for claim AUT-5513827

Hi,

Sorry for the delay. I've been dealing with a lot since the accident.

About the police report — I do have a copy but it's at my parents' house in
Toledo and I won't be able to get it until next weekend. The officer at the
scene was Maria Santos (badge #2281) from DPD if that helps you look it up
on your end.

The accident happened on January 28th at Michigan Ave and Livernois. It was
a two-car collision. The other driver ran a red light. My car (2019 Ford Focus,
VIN 3FADP4BJ7EM207685) was totaled.

I do have gap insurance through my dealer, by the way — is that something
you need documentation for too?

Let me know if there's anything else you need in the meantime.

Thanks,
James Kowalski
(313) 555-0294

customer_reply_1.txt.text: Hi, I finally got the police report. Here are the details: Report No. AA-2026-00437, Date: January 28, 2026, Location: Michigan Ave and Livernois, Detroit MI. Officer: Maria Santos, Badge 2281, DPD. Vehicle: 2019 Ford Focus SE, VIN 3FADP4BJ7EM207685. Total loss declared at scene.
